./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:summary: OpenHand 如何轮换认证配置文件并在模型之间进行回退
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:OpenHand 分两个阶段处理故障：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:OpenHand 对 API 密钥和 OAuth 令牌都使用**认证配置文件**。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:- 密钥存储在 `~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth-profiles.json`（旧版：`~/.openhand/agent/auth-profiles.json`）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:- 旧版仅导入 OAuth 文件：`~/.openhand/credentials/oauth.json`（首次使用时导入到 `auth-profiles.json`）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:配置文件存储在 `~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth-profiles.json` 的 `profiles` 下。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:当一个提供商有多个配置文件时，OpenHand 按以下顺序选择：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:如果没有配置显式顺序，OpenHand 使用轮询顺序：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:OpenHand **为每个会话固定所选的认证配置文件**以保持提供商缓存热度。它**不会**在每个请求时轮换。固定的配置文件会被重用直到：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:自动固定的配置文件（由会话路由器选择）被视为**偏好**：它们会优先尝试，但 OpenHand 可能在速率限制/超时时轮换到另一个配置文件。用户固定的配置文件会锁定到该配置文件；如果失败且配置了模型回退，OpenHand 会移动到下一个模型而不是切换配置文件。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:当配置文件因认证/速率限制错误（或看起来像速率限制的超时）而失败时，OpenHand 将其标记为冷却状态并移动到下一个配置文件。格式/无效请求错误（例如 Cloud Code Assist 工具调用 ID 验证失败）被视为值得故障转移的情况，使用相同的冷却时间。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:账单/额度失败（例如"insufficient credits"/"credit balance too low"）被视为值得故障转移的情况，但它们通常不是暂时性的。OpenHand 不使用短冷却时间，而是将配置文件标记为**禁用**（使用更长的退避时间）并轮换到下一个配置文件/提供商。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/model-failover.md:如果某个提供商的所有配置文件都失败，OpenHand 会移动到 `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks` 中的下一个模型。这适用于认证失败、速率限制和耗尽配置文件轮换的超时（其他错误不会推进回退）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:summary: OpenHand 记忆的工作原理（工作空间文件 + 自动记忆刷新）
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:OpenHand 记忆是**智能体工作空间中的纯 Markdown 文件**。这些文件是唯一的事实来源；模型只"记住"写入磁盘的内容。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:这些文件位于工作空间下（`agents.defaults.workspace`，默认 `~/.openhand/workspace`）。完整布局参见[智能体工作空间](/concepts/agent-workspace)。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:当会话**接近自动压缩**时，OpenHand 会触发一个**静默的智能体回合**，提醒模型在上下文被压缩**之前**写入持久记忆。默认提示明确说明模型*可以回复*，但通常 `NO_REPLY` 是正确的响应，因此用户永远不会看到这个回合。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:OpenHand 可以在 `MEMORY.md` 和 `memory/*.md`（以及你选择加入的任何额外目录或文件）上构建小型向量索引，以便语义查询可以找到相关笔记，即使措辞不同。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:- 默认使用远程嵌入。如果未设置 `memorySearch.provider`，OpenHand 自动选择：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:远程嵌入**需要**嵌入提供商的 API 密钥。OpenHand 从身份验证配置文件、`models.providers.*.apiKey` 或环境变量解析密钥。Codex OAuth 仅涵盖聊天/补全，**不**满足记忆搜索的嵌入需求。对于 Gemini，使用 `GEMINI_API_KEY` 或 `models.providers.google.apiKey`。使用自定义 OpenAI 兼容端点时，设置 `memorySearch.remote.apiKey`（以及可选的 `memorySearch.remote.headers`）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:- 索引存储：每个智能体的 SQLite 位于 `~/.openhand/memory/<agentId>.sqlite`（可通过 `agents.defaults.memorySearch.store.path` 配置，支持 `{agentId}` 令牌）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:- 重新索引触发器：索引存储嵌入的**提供商/模型 + 端点指纹 + 分块参数**。如果其中任何一个发生变化，OpenHand 会自动重置并重新索引整个存储。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:启用时，OpenHand 结合：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:如果你的平台上全文搜索不可用，OpenHand 会回退到纯向量搜索。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:OpenHand 可以在 SQLite 中缓存**块嵌入**，这样重新索引和频繁更新（特别是会话记录）不会重新嵌入未更改的文本。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:- 会话日志存储在磁盘上（`~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/sessions/*.jsonl`）。任何具有文件系统访问权限的进程/用户都可以读取它们，因此将磁盘访问视为信任边界。对于更严格的隔离，在单独的操作系统用户或主机下运行智能体。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:当 sqlite-vec 扩展可用时，OpenHand 将嵌入存储在 SQLite 虚拟表（`vec0`）中，并在数据库中执行向量距离查询。这使搜索保持快速，无需将每个嵌入加载到 JS 中。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/memory.md:- 如果 sqlite-vec 扩展缺失或加载失败，OpenHand 会记录错误并继续使用 JS 回退（无向量表）。

./docs/zh-CN/concepts/agent-loop.md:# 智能体循环（OpenHand）
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/agent-loop.md:在 OpenHand 中，循环是每个会话的单次序列化运行，在模型思考、调用工具和流式输出时发出生命周期和流事件。本文档解释了这个真实循环是如何端到端连接的。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/agent-loop.md:4. `subscribeEmbeddedPiSession` 将 pi-agent-core 事件桥接到 OpenHand `agent` 流：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/agent-loop.md:- 系统提示由 OpenHand 的基础提示、Skills 提示、引导上下文和每次运行的覆盖构建。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/agent-loop.md:OpenHand 有两个钩子系统：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/markdown-formatting.md:OpenHand 通过将出站 Markdown 转换为共享的中间表示（IR），然后再渲染为特定渠道的输出来进行格式化。IR 保留源文本不变，同时携带样式/链接跨度信息，使分块和渲染在各渠道间保持一致。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/markdown-formatting.md:Hello **world** — see [docs](https://docs.openhand.ai).
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/markdown-formatting.md:  "links": [{ "start": 19, "end": 23, "href": "https://docs.openhand.ai" }]
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session-tool.md:- 当给定 `sessionId` 时，OpenHand 将其解析为相应的会话键（缺失的 id 会报错）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session-tool.md:- 主运行完成后，OpenHand 运行**回复循环**：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session-tool.md:- 循环结束后，OpenHand 运行**智能体到智能体通告步骤**（仅目标智能体）：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session-tool.md:- 完成后，OpenHand 运行子智能体**通告步骤**并将结果发布到请求者聊天渠道。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/features.md:  - 你想了解 OpenHand 支持的完整功能列表
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/features.md:summary: OpenHand 在渠道、路由、媒体和用户体验方面的功能。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:OpenHand 将**每个智能体的一个直接聊天会话**视为主会话。直接聊天折叠为 `agent:<agentId>:<mainKey>`（默认 `main`），而群组/频道聊天获得各自的键。`session.mainKey` 会被遵循。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:所有会话状态都**由 Gateway 网关拥有**（"主" OpenHand）。UI 客户端（macOS 应用、WebChat 等）必须向 Gateway 网关查询会话列表和令牌计数，而不是读取本地文件。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:  - 存储文件：`~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/sessions/sessions.json`（每个智能体）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:- 对话记录：`~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/sessions/<SessionId>.jsonl`（Telegram 话题会话使用 `.../<SessionId>-topic-<threadId>.jsonl`）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:- OpenHand **不**读取旧版 Pi/Tau 会话文件夹。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:默认情况下，OpenHand 在 LLM 调用之前从内存上下文中修剪**旧的工具结果**。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:当会话接近自动压缩时，OpenHand 可以运行一个**静默记忆刷新**轮次，提醒模型将持久性笔记写入磁盘。这仅在工作区可写时运行。参见[记忆](/concepts/memory)和[压缩](/concepts/compaction)。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:- 旧版仅空闲模式：如果你设置了 `session.idleMinutes` 而没有任何 `session.reset`/`resetByType` 配置，OpenHand 会保持仅空闲模式以保持向后兼容。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:- 重置触发器：精确的 `/new` 或 `/reset`（加上 `resetTriggers` 中的任何额外项）启动新的会话 ID 并传递消息的其余部分。`/new <model>` 接受模型别名、`provider/model` 或提供商名称（模糊匹配）来设置新会话模型。如果单独发送 `/new` 或 `/reset`，OpenHand 会运行一个简短的"问候"轮次来确认重置。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:// ~/.openhand/openhand.json
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:    store: "~/.openhand/agents/{agentId}/sessions/sessions.json",
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:- `openhand status` — 显示存储路径和最近的会话。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:- `openhand sessions --json` — 导出每个条目（使用 `--active <minutes>` 过滤）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/session.md:- `openhand gateway call sessions.list --params '{}'` — 从运行中的 Gateway 网关获取会话（使用 `--url`/`--token` 进行远程 Gateway 网关访问）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:summary: OpenHand 系统提示词包含的内容及其组装方式
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:OpenHand 为每次智能体运行构建自定义系统提示词。该提示词由 **OpenHand 拥有**，不使用 pi-coding-agent 默认提示词。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:该提示词由 OpenHand 组装并注入到每次智能体运行中。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:- **OpenHand Self-Update**：如何运行 `config.apply` 和 `update.run`。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:- **Documentation**：OpenHand 文档的本地路径（仓库或 npm 包）以及何时阅读它们。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:OpenHand 可以为子智能体渲染更小的系统提示词。运行时为每次运行设置一个 `promptMode`（不是面向用户的配置）：
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:- `minimal`：用于子智能体；省略 **Skills**、**Memory Recall**、**OpenHand Self-Update**、**Model Aliases**、**User Identity**、**Reply Tags**、**Messaging**、**Silent Replies** 和 **Heartbeats**。Tooling、**Safety**、Workspace、Sandbox、Current Date & Time（已知时）、Runtime 和注入的上下文仍然可用。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:当存在符合条件的 Skills 时，OpenHand 注入一个紧凑的**可用 Skills 列表**（`formatSkillsForPrompt`），其中包含每个 Skill 的**文件路径**。提示词指示模型使用 `read` 加载列出位置（工作区、托管或内置）的 SKILL.md。如果没有符合条件的 Skills，则省略 Skills 部分。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/system-prompt.md:如果可用，系统提示词包含一个 **Documentation** 部分，指向本地 OpenHand 文档目录（仓库工作区中的 `docs/` 或打包的 npm 包文档），并注明公共镜像、源仓库、社区 Discord 和 ClawHub (https://clawhub.com) 用于 Skills 发现。提示词指示模型首先查阅本地文档了解 OpenHand 行为、命令、配置或架构，并尽可能自己运行 `openhand status`（仅在无法访问时询问用户）。
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/presence.md:summary: OpenHand 在线状态条目如何生成、合并和显示
./docs/zh-CN/concepts/presence.md:OpenHand"在线状态"是以下内容的轻量级、尽力而为的视图：
./docs/zh-CN/diagnostics/flags.md:OPENHAND_DIAGNOSTICS=telegram.http,telegram.payload
./docs/zh-CN/diagnostics/flags.md:OPENHAND_DIAGNOSTICS=0
./docs/zh-CN/diagnostics/flags.md:/tmp/openhand/openhand-YYYY-MM-DD.log

./docs/zh-CN/diagnostics/flags.md:rg "telegram http error" /tmp/openhand/openhand-*.log
./docs/zh-CN/diagnostics/flags.md:tail -f /tmp/openhand/openhand-$(date +%F).log | rg "telegram http error"

./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:# Gmail Pub/Sub -> OpenHand
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:目标：Gmail watch -> Pub/Sub 推送 -> `gog gmail watch serve` -> OpenHand webhook。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:- 已启用 OpenHand hooks（参见 [Webhooks](/automation/webhook)）。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:    token: "OPENHAND_HOOK_TOKEN",
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:    token: "OPENHAND_HOOK_TOKEN",
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:使用 OpenHand 助手将所有内容接入在一起（在 macOS 上通过 brew 安装依赖）：
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:openhand webhooks gmail setup \
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:  --account openhand@gmail.com
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:- 为 `openhand webhooks gmail run` 写入 `hooks.gmail` 配置。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:路径说明：当启用 `tailscale.mode` 时，OpenHand 会自动将 `hooks.gmail.serve.path` 设置为 `/`，并将公共路径保持在 `hooks.gmail.tailscale.path`（默认 `/gmail-pubsub`），因为 Tailscale 在代理之前会剥离设置的路径前缀。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:- 设置 `OPENHAND_SKIP_GMAIL_WATCHER=1` 可退出（如果你自己运行守护进程则很有用）。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:openhand webhooks gmail run

./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:- `--hook-url` 指向 OpenHand `/hooks/gmail`（已映射；隔离运行 + 摘要发送到主线程）。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:- `--include-body` 和 `--max-bytes` 控制发送到 OpenHand 的正文片段。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/gmail-pubsub.md:推荐：`openhand webhooks gmail run` 封装了相同的流程并自动续期 watch。

./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:Hooks 提供了一个可扩展的事件驱动系统，用于响应智能体命令和事件自动执行操作。Hooks 从目录中自动发现，可以通过 CLI 命令管理，类似于 OpenHand 中 Skills 的工作方式。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:- **Webhooks**：外部 HTTP webhooks，让其他系统触发 OpenHand 中的工作。参见 [Webhook Hooks](/automation/webhook) 或使用 `openhand webhooks` 获取 Gmail 助手命令。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:- 在不修改核心代码的情况下扩展 OpenHand 的行为
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:OpenHand 附带三个自动发现的捆绑 hooks：
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:- **💾 session-memory**：当你发出 `/new` 时将会话上下文保存到智能体工作区（默认 `~/.openhand/workspace/memory/`）
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:- **📝 command-logger**：将所有命令事件记录到 `~/.openhand/logs/commands.log`
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:openhand hooks list
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:openhand hooks enable session-memory
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:openhand hooks check
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:openhand hooks info session-memory
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:在新手引导期间（`openhand onboard`），你将被提示启用推荐的 hooks。向导会自动发现符合条件的 hooks 并呈现供选择。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:2. **托管 hooks**：`~/.openhand/hooks/`（用户安装，跨工作区共享）
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:3. **捆绑 hooks**：`<openhand>/dist/hooks/bundled/`（随 OpenHand 附带）
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:Hook 包是标准的 npm 包，通过 `package.json` 中的 `openhand.hooks` 导出一个或多个 hooks。使用以下命令安装：
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:openhand hooks install <path-or-spec>
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:  "openhand": {
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:Hook 包可以附带依赖；它们将安装在 `~/.openhand/hooks/<id>` 下。
./docs/zh-CN/automation/hooks.md:homepage: https://docs.openhand.ai/automation/hooks#my-hook

./docs/zh-CN/tts.md:OpenHand 可以使用 ElevenLabs、OpenAI 或 Edge TTS 将出站回复转换为音频。它可以在任何 OpenHand 能发送音频的地方工作；Telegram 会显示圆形语音消息气泡。
./docs/zh-CN/tts.md:Edge TTS **不**需要 API 密钥。如果没有找到 API 密钥，OpenHand 默认使用 Edge TTS（除非通过 `messages.tts.edge.enabled=false` 禁用）。
./docs/zh-CN/tts.md:TTS 配置位于 `openhand.json` 中的 `messages.tts` 下。完整 schema 在 [Gateway 网关配置](/gateway/configuration)中。
./docs/zh-CN/tts.md:      prefsPath: "~/.openhand/settings/tts.json",
./docs/zh-CN/tts.md:- 如果 `provider` **未设置**，OpenHand 优先选择 `openai`（如果有密钥），然后是 `elevenlabs`（如果有密钥），否则是 `edge`。
./docs/zh-CN/tts.md:斜杠命令将本地覆盖写入 `prefsPath`（默认：`~/.openhand/settings/tts.json`，可通过 `OPENHAND_TTS_PREFS` 或 `messages.tts.prefsPath` 覆盖）。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- 令牌与 `gateway.auth.token`（或 `OPENHAND_GATEWAY_TOKEN`）的值相同，UI 在首次加载后会存储它。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- **Tailscale Serve**（推荐）：保持绑定 loopback，运行 `openhand gateway --tailscale serve`，打开 `https://<magicdns>/`。如果 `gateway.auth.allowTailscale` 为 `true`，身份标头满足认证要求（无需令牌）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- **Tailnet 绑定**：运行 `openhand gateway --bind tailnet --token "<token>"`，打开 `http://<tailscale-ip>:18789/`，在仪表板设置中粘贴令牌。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- **SSH 隧道**：`ssh -N -L 18789:127.0.0.1:18789 user@host`，然后从 `openhand dashboard` 打开 `http://127.0.0.1:18789/?token=...`。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### 运行 OpenHand 需要 Claude 或 OpenAI 订阅吗
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:不需要。你可以使用 **API 密钥**（Anthropic/OpenAI/其他）或**纯本地模型**运行 OpenHand，这样你的数据留在你的设备上。订阅（Claude Pro/Max 或 OpenAI Codex）是这些提供商的可选认证方式。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:`claude setup-token` 通过 Claude Code CLI 生成一个**令牌字符串**（在 Web 控制台中不可用）。你可以在**任何机器**上运行它。在向导中选择 **Anthropic token (paste setup-token)** 或使用 `openhand models auth paste-token --provider anthropic` 粘贴。令牌作为 **anthropic** 提供商的认证配置文件存储，像 API 密钥一样使用（无自动刷新）。更多详情：[OAuth](/concepts/oauth)。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:复制它打印的令牌，然后在向导中选择 **Anthropic token (paste setup-token)**。如果你想在 Gateway 网关主机上运行，使用 `openhand models auth setup-token --provider anthropic`。如果你在其他地方运行了 `claude setup-token`，在 Gateway 网关主机上使用 `openhand models auth paste-token --provider anthropic` 粘贴。参阅 [Anthropic](/providers/anthropic)。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:是的——通过 **setup-token**。OpenHand 不再复用 Claude Code CLI OAuth 令牌；请使用 setup-token 或 Anthropic API 密钥。在任何地方生成令牌并在 Gateway 网关主机上粘贴。参阅 [Anthropic](/providers/anthropic) 和 [OAuth](/concepts/oauth)。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:提示：设置一个**备用模型**，这样 OpenHand 在某个提供商被限速时仍能继续回复。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 通过 OAuth（ChatGPT 登录）支持 **OpenAI Code (Codex)**。向导可以运行 OAuth 流程，并在适当时将默认模型设置为 `openai-codex/gpt-5.2`。参阅[模型提供商](/concepts/model-providers)和[向导](/start/wizard)。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:是的。OpenHand 完全支持 **OpenAI Code (Codex) 订阅 OAuth**。新手引导向导可以为你运行 OAuth 流程。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:Gemini CLI 使用**插件认证流程**，而不是 `openhand.json` 中的 client id 或 secret。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:2. 登录：`openhand models auth login --provider google-gemini-cli --set-default`
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:通常不适合。OpenHand 需要大上下文 + 强安全性；小显卡会截断且泄漏。如果必须使用，请在本地运行你能运行的**最大** MiniMax M2.1 版本（LM Studio），参阅 [/gateway/local-models](/gateway/local-models)。较小/量化的模型会增加提示注入风险——参阅[安全](/gateway/security)。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:你需要**某台登录了 Messages 的 macOS 设备**。它**不一定**是 Mac mini——任何 Mac 都可以。OpenHand 的 iMessage 集成在 macOS 上运行（BlueBubbles 或 `imsg`），而 Gateway 网关可以在其他地方运行。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### 可以在虚拟机中运行 OpenHand 吗？有什么要求
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:## 什么是 OpenHand？
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### 用一段话描述 OpenHand
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 是一个运行在你自己设备上的个人 AI 助手。它在你已经使用的消息平台上回复（WhatsApp、Telegram、Slack、Mattermost（插件）、Discord、Google Chat、Signal、iMessage、WebChat），还可以在支持的平台上进行语音和实时 Canvas。**Gateway 网关** 是常开的控制平面；助手是产品。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 不是“只是一个 Claude 包装器”。它是一个**本地优先的控制平面**，让你在**自己的硬件**上运行强大的助手，可从你已经使用的聊天应用访问，具有有状态会话、记忆和工具——无需将工作流程的控制权交给托管 SaaS。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### OpenHand 日常最常用的五个场景是什么
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### OpenHand 能否帮助 SaaS 进行获客、外联、广告和博客
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:对于**外联或广告投放**，请保持人工审核。避免垃圾邮件，遵守当地法律和平台政策，在发送之前审查所有内容。最安全的模式是让 OpenHand 起草，由你批准。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 是一个**个人助手**和协调层，不是 IDE 替代品。使用 Claude Code 或 Codex 在仓库中进行最快的直接编码循环。当你需要持久记忆、跨设备访问和工具编排时，使用 OpenHand。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:展示：https://openhand.ai/showcase
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:使用托管覆盖而不是编辑仓库副本。将你的更改放在 `~/.openhand/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`（或通过 `~/.openhand/openhand.json` 中的 `skills.load.extraDirs` 添加文件夹）。优先级是 `<workspace>/skills` > `~/.openhand/skills` > 内置，所以托管覆盖优先生效而不会修改 git。只有值得上游合并的编辑才应该放在仓库中并作为 PR 提交。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:可以。通过 `~/.openhand/openhand.json` 中的 `skills.load.extraDirs` 添加额外目录（最低优先级）。默认优先级保持不变：`<workspace>/skills` → `~/.openhand/skills` → 内置 → `skills.load.extraDirs`。`clawhub` 默认安装到 `./skills`，OpenHand 将其视为 `<workspace>/skills`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- 确认 cron 已启用（`cron.enabled`）且未设置 `OPENHAND_SKIP_CRON`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:openhand cron run <jobId> --force
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:openhand cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### OpenHand 能否按计划或在后台持续运行任务
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:不能直接运行。macOS Skills 受 `metadata.openhand.os` 和所需二进制文件限制，Skills 只有在 **Gateway 网关主机**上符合条件时才会出现在系统提示中。在 Linux 上，`darwin` 专用 Skills（如 `apple-notes`、`apple-reminders`、`things-mac`）不会加载，除非你覆盖限制。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:在 macOS 二进制文件所在的地方运行 Gateway 网关，然后从 Linux 通过[远程模式](#how-do-i-run-openhand-in-remote-mode-client-connects-to-a-gateway-elsewhere)或 Tailscale 连接。Skills 正常加载，因为 Gateway 网关主机是 macOS。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:在 Linux 上运行 Gateway 网关，配对一个 macOS 节点（菜单栏应用），并在 Mac 上将**节点运行命令**设置为“始终询问”或“始终允许”。当所需二进制文件存在于节点上时，OpenHand 可以将 macOS 专用 Skills 视为符合条件。智能体通过 `nodes` 工具运行这些 Skills。如果你选择“始终询问”，在提示中批准“始终允许”会将该命令添加到允许列表。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:3. 覆盖 Skills 元数据（工作区或 `~/.openhand/skills`）以允许 Linux：
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:   metadata: { "openhand": { "os": ["darwin", "linux"], "requires": { "bins": ["imsg"] } } }
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:对于 iMessage，你也可以将 `channels.imessage.cliPath` 指向 SSH 包装器（OpenHand 只需要 stdio）。参阅 [iMessage](/channels/imessage)。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:ClawHub 安装到当前目录下的 `./skills`（或回退到你配置的 OpenHand 工作区）；OpenHand 在下一个会话中将其视为 `<workspace>/skills`。对于跨智能体共享的 Skills，将它们放在 `~/.openhand/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`。某些 Skills 期望通过 Homebrew 安装二进制文件；在 Linux 上意味着 Linuxbrew（参阅上面的 Homebrew Linux 常见问题条目）。参阅[Skills](/tools/skills)和 [ClawHub](/tools/clawhub)。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 记忆就是智能体工作区中的 Markdown 文件：
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 还会运行**静默的预压缩记忆刷新**，以提醒模型在自动压缩之前写入持久笔记。这只在工作区可写时运行（只读沙箱会跳过）。参阅[记忆](/concepts/memory)。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:如果你没有明确设置提供商，OpenHand 会在能解析 API 密钥（认证配置文件、`models.providers.*.apiKey` 或环境变量）时自动选择提供商。如果 OpenAI 密钥可解析则优先使用 OpenAI，否则如果 Gemini 密钥可解析则使用 Gemini。如果两个密钥都不可用，记忆搜索保持禁用直到你配置它。如果你配置了本地模型路径且存在，OpenHand 优先使用 `local`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### OpenHand 使用的所有数据都保存在本地吗
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:不是——**OpenHand 的状态是本地的**，但**外部服务仍然会看到你发送给它们的内容**。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- **默认本地：** 会话、记忆文件、配置和工作区位于 Gateway 网关主机上（`~/.openhand` + 你的工作区目录）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### OpenHand 将数据存储在哪里
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:所有内容位于 `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR`（默认：`~/.openhand`）下：
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/openhand.json`                             | 主配置（JSON5）                                      |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/credentials/oauth.json`                    | 旧版 OAuth 导入（首次使用时复制到认证配置文件）      |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth-profiles.json` | 认证配置文件（OAuth + API 密钥）                     |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth.json`          | 运行时认证缓存（自动管理）                           |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/credentials/`                              | 提供商状态（例如 `whatsapp/<accountId>/creds.json`） |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/`                                   | 按智能体的状态（agentDir + 会话）                    |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/sessions/`                | 对话历史和状态（按智能体）                           |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/sessions/sessions.json`   | 会话元数据（按智能体）                               |
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:旧版单智能体路径：`~/.openhand/agent/*`（通过 `openhand doctor` 迁移）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:你的**工作区**（AGENTS.md、记忆文件、Skills 等）是独立的，通过 `agents.defaults.workspace` 配置（默认：`~/.openhand/workspace`）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:这些文件位于**智能体工作区**中，而不是 `~/.openhand`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- **状态目录（`~/.openhand`）**：配置、凭据、认证配置文件、会话、日志和共享 Skills（`~/.openhand/skills`）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:默认工作区是 `~/.openhand/workspace`，可通过以下方式配置：
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:  agents: { defaults: { workspace: "~/.openhand/workspace" } },
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:**不要**提交 `~/.openhand` 下的任何内容（凭据、会话、令牌）。如果你需要完整恢复，将工作区和状态目录分别备份（参阅上面的迁移问题）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### 如何完全卸载 OpenHand
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:可以。工作区是**默认 cwd** 和记忆锚点，不是硬沙箱。相对路径在工作区内解析，但绝对路径可以访问其他主机位置，除非启用了沙箱。如果你需要隔离，使用 [`agents.defaults.sandbox`](/gateway/sandboxing) 或按智能体的沙箱设置。如果你希望某个仓库作为默认工作目录，将该智能体的 `workspace` 指向仓库根目录。OpenHand 仓库只是源代码；除非你有意要让智能体在其中工作，否则保持工作区独立。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 从 `$OPENHAND_CONFIG_PATH`（默认：`~/.openhand/openhand.json`）读取可选的 **JSON5** 配置：
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:$OPENHAND_CONFIG_PATH
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:如果文件不存在，使用安全的默认值（包括默认工作区 `~/.openhand/workspace`）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:非 local loopback 绑定**需要认证**。配置 `gateway.auth.mode` + `gateway.auth.token`（或使用 `OPENHAND_GATEWAY_TOKEN`）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:如果你**确实**想要开放 local loopback，从配置中移除 `gateway.auth`。Doctor 可以随时为你生成令牌：`openhand doctor --generate-gateway-token`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:`web_fetch` 无需 API 密钥即可工作。`web_search` 需要 Brave Search API 密钥。**推荐：** 运行 `openhand configure --section web` 将其存储在 `tools.web.search.apiKey` 中。环境变量替代方案：为 Gateway 网关进程设置 `BRAVE_API_KEY`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- 守护进程从 `~/.openhand/.env`（或服务环境）读取环境变量。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- 从备份恢复（git 或复制的 `~/.openhand/openhand.json`）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- 如果没有备份，重新运行 `openhand doctor` 并重新配置渠道/模型。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- 对小更改使用 `openhand config set`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- 对交互式编辑使用 `openhand configure`。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### 为什么 openhand gateway status 显示 Config (cli) 和 Config (service) 不同
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:你正在编辑一个配置文件，而服务运行的是另一个（通常是 `--profile` / `OPENHAND_STATE_DIR` 不匹配）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:openhand gateway install --force
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 通过在启动时立即绑定 WebSocket 监听器来强制运行时锁（默认 `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`）。如果绑定因 `EADDRINUSE` 失败，它会抛出 `GatewayLockError` 表示另一个实例已在监听。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:修复：停止另一个实例，释放端口，或使用 `openhand gateway --port <port>` 运行。

./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### 通俗解释：openhand gateway restart 与 openhand gateway
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- `openhand gateway restart`：重启**后台服务**（launchd/systemd）。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:- `openhand gateway`：在这个终端会话中**前台**运行 Gateway 网关。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:如果你安装了服务，使用 Gateway 网关命令。想要一次性前台运行时使用 `openhand gateway`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:智能体的出站附件必须包含 `MEDIA:<path-or-url>` 行（独占一行）。参阅 [OpenHand 助手设置](/start/openhand)和 [Agent send](/tools/agent-send)。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:openhand message send --target +15555550123 --message "Here you go" --media /path/to/file.png
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:### 将 OpenHand 暴露给入站私信安全吗
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:  - 批准方式：`openhand pairing approve <channel> <code>`
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:  - 每个渠道的待处理请求上限为 **3 个**；如果没收到代码，检查 `openhand pairing list <channel>`。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:运行 `openhand doctor` 以发现有风险的私信策略。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:openhand pairing list telegram
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:不会。WhatsApp 的默认私信策略是**配对**。未知发送者只会收到配对码，他们的消息**不会被处理**。OpenHand 只回复它收到的聊天或你明确触发的发送。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:openhand pairing approve whatsapp <code>
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:openhand pairing list whatsapp
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:OpenHand 默认阻止**跨提供商**消息。如果工具调用绑定到 Telegram，除非你明确允许，否则不会发送到 Discord。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:**答：** 在 OpenHand 中，凭据和模型选择是分开的。设置 `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`（或在认证配置文件中存储 Anthropic API 密钥）启用认证，但实际的默认模型是你在 `agents.defaults.model.primary` 中配置的（例如 `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5` 或 `anthropic/claude-opus-4-5`）。如果你看到 `No credentials found for profile "anthropic:default"`，意味着 Gateway 网关在正在运行的智能体的预期 `auth-profiles.json` 中找不到 Anthropic 凭据。
./docs/zh-CN/help/faq.md:仍然卡住？在 [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/clawd) 中提问或发起 [GitHub 讨论](https://github.com/openhand/openhand/discussions)。

./docs/zh-CN/refactor/exec-host.md:- Unix socket 位于 `~/.openhand/exec-approvals.sock`（0600）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:OpenHand 可以为 Gateway 网关仪表盘和 WebSocket 端口自动配置 Tailscale **Serve**（tailnet）或 **Funnel**（公共）。这使 Gateway 网关保持绑定到 loopback，同时 Tailscale 提供 HTTPS、路由和（对于 Serve）身份头。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:- `funnel`：通过 `tailscale funnel` 的公共 HTTPS。OpenHand 需要共享密码。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:- `token`（设置 `OPENHAND_GATEWAY_TOKEN` 时的默认值）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:- `password`（通过 `OPENHAND_GATEWAY_PASSWORD` 或配置的共享密钥）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:有效的 Serve 代理请求可以通过 Tailscale 身份头（`tailscale-user-login`）进行认证，无需提供令牌/密码。OpenHand 通过本地 Tailscale 守护进程（`tailscale whois`）解析 `x-forwarded-for` 地址并将其与头匹配来验证身份，然后才接受它。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:OpenHand 仅在请求从 loopback 到达并带有 Tailscale 的 `x-forwarded-for`、`x-forwarded-proto` 和 `x-forwarded-host` 头时才将其视为 Serve 请求。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:优先使用 `OPENHAND_GATEWAY_PASSWORD` 而不是将密码提交到磁盘。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:openhand gateway --tailscale serve
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:openhand gateway --tailscale funnel --auth password
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/tailscale.md:- 如果你希望 OpenHand 在关闭时撤销 `tailscale serve` 或 `tailscale funnel` 配置，设置 `gateway.tailscale.resetOnExit`。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:OpenHand 支持模型提供商的 OAuth 和 API 密钥。对于 Anthropic 账户，我们推荐使用 **API 密钥**。对于 Claude 订阅访问，使用 `claude setup-token` 创建的长期令牌。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:2. 将其放在 **Gateway 网关主机**（运行 `openhand gateway` 的机器）上。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:openhand models status
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:3. 如果 Gateway 网关在 systemd/launchd 下运行，最好将密钥放在 `~/.openhand/.env` 中以便守护进程可以读取：
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:cat >> ~/.openhand/.env <<'EOF'
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:openhand models status
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:openhand doctor
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:如果你不想自己管理环境变量，新手引导向导可以为守护进程使用存储 API 密钥：`openhand onboard`。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:参阅[帮助](/help)了解环境变量继承的详情（`env.shellEnv`、`~/.openhand/.env`、systemd/launchd）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:然后将其粘贴到 OpenHand：
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:openhand models auth setup-token --provider anthropic

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:openhand models auth order clear --provider anthropic
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:openhand models status
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/authentication.md:运行 `openhand models status` 确认哪个配置文件即将过期。如果配置文件缺失，重新运行 `claude setup-token` 并再次粘贴令牌。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/cli-backends.md:当 API 提供商宕机、被限流或暂时异常时，OpenHand 可以运行**本地 AI CLI** 作为**纯文本回退**。这是有意保守的设计：
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/cli-backends.md:你可以**无需任何配置**使用 Claude Code CLI（OpenHand 自带内置默认值）：

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/local-models.md:summary: 在本地 LLM 上运行 OpenHand（LM Studio、vLLM、LiteLLM、自定义 OpenAI 端点）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/local-models.md:本地运行是可行的，但 OpenHand 期望大上下文 + 强大的提示注入防御。小显存会截断上下文并泄露安全性。目标要高：**≥2 台满配 Mac Studio 或同等 GPU 配置（约 $30k+）**。单张 **24 GB** GPU 仅适用于较轻的提示，且延迟更高。使用**你能运行的最大/完整尺寸模型变体**；激进量化或"小型"检查点会增加提示注入风险（参见[安全](/gateway/security)）。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:summary: OpenHand 常见故障的快速故障排除指南
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:当 OpenHand 出现异常时，以下是解决方法。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:| `openhand status`                  | 本地摘要：操作系统 + 更新、Gateway 网关可达性/模式、服务、智能体/会话、提供商配置状态 | 首次检查，快速概览                    |
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:| `openhand status --all`            | 完整本地诊断（只读、可粘贴、相对安全）包括日志尾部                                    | 当你需要分享调试报告时                |
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:| `openhand status --deep`           | 运行 Gateway 网关健康检查（包括提供商探测；需要可达的 Gateway 网关）                  | 当"已配置"不意味着"正常工作"时        |
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:| `openhand gateway probe`           | Gateway 网关发现 + 可达性（本地 + 远程目标）                                          | 当你怀疑正在探测错误的 Gateway 网关时 |
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:| `openhand channels status --probe` | 向运行中的 Gateway 网关查询渠道状态（并可选探测）                                     | 当 Gateway 网关可达但渠道异常时       |
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:| `openhand gateway status`          | 监管程序状态（launchd/systemd/schtasks）、运行时 PID/退出、最后的 Gateway 网关错误    | 当服务"看起来已加载"但没有运行时      |
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:| `openhand logs --follow`           | 实时日志（运行时问题的最佳信号）                                                      | 当你需要实际的故障原因时              |
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/troubleshooting.md:**分享输出：** 优先使用 `openhand status --all`（它会隐藏令牌）。如果你粘贴 `openhand status`，考虑先设置 `OPENHAND_SHOW_SECRETS=0`（令牌预览）。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:## 快速检查：`openhand security audit`
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:openhand security audit
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:openhand security audit --deep
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:openhand security audit --fix
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:- 收紧本地权限（`~/.openhand` → `700`，配置文件 → `600`，以及常见状态文件如 `credentials/*.json`、`agents/*/agent/auth-profiles.json` 和 `agents/*/sessions/sessions.json`）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:OpenHand 既是产品也是实验：你正在将前沿模型的行为连接到真实的消息平台和真实的工具。**不存在"完美安全"的设置。** 目标是有意识地考虑：
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:如果运行 `--deep`，OpenHand 还会尝试尽力进行实时 Gateway 网关探测。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:- **WhatsApp**：`~/.openhand/credentials/whatsapp/<accountId>/creds.json`
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:- **配对白名单**：`~/.openhand/credentials/<channel>-allowFrom.json`
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:- **模型认证配置**：`~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth-profiles.json`
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:- **旧版 OAuth 导入**：`~/.openhand/credentials/oauth.json`

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:OpenHand 将会话记录存储在 `~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/sessions/*.jsonl` 下的磁盘上。这是会话连续性和（可选）会话记忆索引所必需的，但这也意味着**任何具有文件系统访问权限的进程/用户都可以读取这些日志**。将磁盘访问视为信任边界，并锁定 `~/.openhand` 的权限（参见下面的审计部分）。如果你需要在智能体之间进行更强的隔离，请在单独的操作系统用户或单独的主机下运行它们。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/security/index.md:当 `gateway.auth.allowTailscale` 为 `true`（Serve 的默认值）时，OpenHand 接受 Tailscale Serve 身份头（`tailscale-user-login`）作为认证。OpenHand 通过本地 Tailscale 守护进程（`tailscale whois`）解析 `x-forwarded-for` 地址并将其与头匹配来验证身份。这仅对命中回环并包含 `x-forwarded-for`、`x-forwarded-proto` 和 `x-forwarded-host`（由 Tailscale 注入）的请求触发。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/doctor.md:这些迁移是尽力而为且幂等的；当 doctor 将任何遗留文件夹作为备份保留时会发出警告。Gateway 网关/CLI 也会在启动时自动迁移遗留会话 + 智能体目录，因此历史/认证/模型会落在每智能体路径中，无需手动运行 doctor。WhatsApp 认证有意仅通过 `openhand doctor` 迁移。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/doctor.md:- **多个状态目录**：当多个 `~/.openhand` 文件夹存在于不同 home 目录或当 `OPENHAND_STATE_DIR` 指向别处时发出警告（历史可能在安装之间分裂）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/doctor.md:- **配置文件权限**：当 `~/.openhand/openhand.json` 对组/其他用户可读时发出警告，并提供收紧到 `600` 的选项。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/doctor.md:Doctor 检测遗留的 Gateway 网关服务（launchd/systemd/schtasks），并提供删除它们并使用当前 Gateway 网关端口安装 OpenHand 服务的选项。它还可以扫描额外的类 Gateway 网关服务并打印清理提示。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/doctor.md:配置文件命名的 OpenHand Gateway 网关服务被视为一等公民，不会被标记为"额外的"。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/discovery.md:设计目标是将所有网络发现/广播保留在 **Node Gateway 网关**（`openhand gateway`）中，并让客户端（mac 应用、iOS）作为消费者。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/discovery.md:  - `_openhand-gw._tcp`（Gateway 网关传输信标）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/discovery.md:  - `canvasPort=18793`（默认画布主机端口；服务于 `/__openhand__/canvas/`）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/discovery.md:  - `cliPath=<path>`（可选；可运行的 `openhand` 入口点或二进制文件的绝对路径）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/discovery.md:- `OPENHAND_DISABLE_BONJOUR=1` 禁用广播。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/discovery.md:- `~/.openhand/openhand.json` 中的 `gateway.bind` 控制 Gateway 网关绑定模式。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/discovery.md:- `OPENHAND_SSH_PORT` 覆盖 TXT 中广播的 SSH 端口（默认为 22）。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/index.md:- 配置热重载监视 `~/.openhand/openhand.json`（或 `OPENHAND_CONFIG_PATH`）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/index.md:- 默认在 `canvasHost.port`（默认 `18793`）上启动 Canvas 文件服务器，从 `~/.openhand/workspace/canvas` 提供 `http://<gateway-host>:18793/__openhand__/canvas/`。使用 `canvasHost.enabled=false` 或 `OPENHAND_SKIP_CANVAS_HOST=1` 禁用。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/configuration.md:WhatsApp 入站前缀通过 `channels.whatsapp.messagePrefix` 配置（已弃用：`messages.messagePrefix`）。默认保持**不变**：当 `channels.whatsapp.allowFrom` 为空时为 `"[openhand]"`，否则为 `""`（无前缀）。使用 `"[openhand]"` 时，如果路由的智能体设置了 `identity.name`，OpenHand 会改用 `[{identity.name}]`。

./docs/zh-CN/gateway/remote-gateway-readme.md:旧版注意事项：如果存在任何遗留的 `com.openhand.ssh-tunnel` LaunchAgent，请将其删除。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/remote-gateway-readme.md:OpenHand.app 连接到你的客户端机器上的 `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`。SSH 隧道将该连接转发到运行 Gateway 网关的远程机器的端口 18789。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/network-model.md:大多数操作通过 Gateway 网关（`openhand gateway`）进行，它是一个长期运行的单一进程，负责管理渠道连接和 WebSocket 控制平面。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/network-model.md:- 优先使用回环地址：Gateway 网关的 WS 默认为 `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`。即使是回环连接，向导也会默认生成 gateway token。若需通过 tailnet 访问，请运行 `openhand gateway --bind tailnet --token ...`，因为非回环绑定必须使用 token。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/network-model.md:- Canvas 主机是一个 HTTP 文件服务器，运行在 `canvasHost.port`（默认 `18793`）上，提供 `/__openhand__/canvas/` 路径供节点 WebView 使用。参见 [Gateway 网关配置](/gateway/configuration)（`canvasHost`）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/background-process.md:OpenHand 通过 `exec` 工具运行 shell 命令，并将长时间运行的任务保存在内存中。`process` 工具管理这些后台会话。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/background-process.md:- `OPENHAND_BASH_PENDING_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS`：每个流的待处理 stdout/stderr 上限（字符）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- `openhand status` — 本地摘要：Gateway 网关可达性/模式、更新提示、已链接渠道认证时长、会话 + 最近活动。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- `openhand status --all` — 完整本地诊断（只读、彩色、可安全粘贴用于调试）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- `openhand status --deep` — 还会探测运行中的 Gateway 网关（支持时进行每渠道探测）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- `openhand health --json` — 向运行中的 Gateway 网关请求完整健康快照（仅 WS；不直接访问 Baileys 套接字）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- 日志：跟踪 `/tmp/openhand/openhand-*.log` 并过滤 `web-heartbeat`、`web-reconnect`、`web-auto-reply`、`web-inbound`。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- 磁盘上的凭证：`ls -l ~/.openhand/credentials/whatsapp/<accountId>/creds.json`（mtime 应该是最近的）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- 会话存储：`ls -l ~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/sessions/sessions.json`（路径可在配置中覆盖）。计数和最近收件人通过 `status` 显示。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- 重新链接流程：当日志中出现状态码 409–515 或 `loggedOut` 时，执行 `openhand channels logout && openhand channels login --verbose`。（注意：配对后状态 515 时 QR 登录流程会自动重启一次。）
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- `logged out` 或状态 409–515 → 使用 `openhand channels logout` 然后 `openhand channels login` 重新链接。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:- Gateway 网关不可达 → 启动它：`openhand gateway --port 18789`（如果端口被占用则使用 `--force`）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/health.md:`openhand health --json` 向运行中的 Gateway 网关请求其健康快照（CLI 不直接访问渠道套接字）。它报告已链接凭证/认证时长（如可用）、每渠道探测摘要、会话存储摘要和探测持续时间。如果 Gateway 网关不可达或探测失败/超时，它以非零退出。使用 `--timeout <ms>` 覆盖默认的 10 秒。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/remote.md:- 使用 macOS 应用的 **Remote over SSH** 模式（设置 → 通用 → "OpenHand runs"）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/remote.md:- `openhand health` 和 `openhand status --deep` 现在通过 `ws://127.0.0.1:18789` 访问远程 Gateway 网关。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/remote.md:- `openhand gateway {status,health,send,agent,call}` 在需要时也可以通过 `--url` 指定转发的 URL。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/remote.md:注意：将 `18789` 替换为你配置的 `gateway.port`（或 `--port`/`OPENHAND_GATEWAY_PORT`）。
./docs/zh-CN/gateway/protocol.md:Gateway 网关 WS 协议是 OpenHand 的**单一控制平面 + 节点传输**。所有客户端（CLI、Web UI、macOS 应用、iOS/Android 节点、无头节点）都通过 WebSocket 连接，并在握手时声明其**角色** + **作用域**。

./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:### OpenHand 配置（最小）
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:OpenHand 可以使用 Slack 用户令牌（`xoxp-...`）进行读取操作（历史记录、置顶、表情回应、表情符号、成员信息）。默认情况下保持只读：当存在用户令牌时，读取优先使用用户令牌，而写入仍然使用 bot 令牌，除非你明确选择加入。即使设置了 `userTokenReadOnly: false`，当 bot 令牌可用时，写入仍然优先使用 bot 令牌。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:- 写入操作（发送/编辑/删除消息、添加/移除表情回应、置顶/取消置顶、文件上传）默认使用 bot 令牌。如果 `userTokenReadOnly: false` 且没有可用的 bot 令牌，OpenHand 会回退到用户令牌。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:### OpenHand 配置（最小）
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:    "name": "OpenHand",

./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:      "display_name": "OpenHand",
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:        "command": "/openhand",
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:        "description": "Send a message to OpenHand",
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:      "name": "openhand",
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:默认情况下，OpenHand 在主频道回复。使用 `channels.slack.replyToMode` 控制自动线程：
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:- 如果 Slack 未提供 `channel_type`，OpenHand 会从频道 ID 前缀（`D`、`C`、`G`）推断并默认为 `channel` 以保持会话键稳定。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:- 通过以下方式批准：`openhand pairing approve slack <code>`。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/slack.md:- 启动时，OpenHand 将白名单中的频道/用户名解析为 ID（在令牌允许时）并记录映射；未解析的条目按原样保留。

./docs/zh-CN/channels/index.md:  - 你想为 OpenHand 选择一个聊天渠道
./docs/zh-CN/channels/index.md:summary: OpenHand 可连接的消息平台
./docs/zh-CN/channels/index.md:OpenHand 可以在你已经使用的任何聊天应用上与你交流。每个渠道通过 Gateway 网关连接。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/index.md:- 渠道可以同时运行；配置多个渠道后，OpenHand 会按聊天进行路由。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:2. 在 `~/.openhand/openhand.json` 中配置 WhatsApp。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:3. 运行 `openhand channels login` 扫描二维码（关联设备）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:WhatsApp 需要真实手机号码进行验证。VoIP 和虚拟号码通常会被封锁。在 WhatsApp 上运行 OpenHand 有两种支持的方式：
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:为 OpenHand 使用**单独的手机号码**。最佳用户体验，清晰的路由，无自聊天怪异问题。理想设置：**备用/旧 Android 手机 + eSIM**。保持 Wi-Fi 和电源连接，通过二维码关联。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:**WhatsApp Business：** 你可以在同一设备上使用不同号码的 WhatsApp Business。非常适合将个人 WhatsApp 分开——安装 WhatsApp Business 并在那里注册 OpenHand 号码。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:`openhand pairing approve whatsapp <code>`
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:快速备选方案：在**你自己的号码**上运行 OpenHand。给自己发消息（WhatsApp"给自己发消息"）进行测试，这样就不会打扰联系人。在设置和实验期间需要在主手机上阅读验证码。**必须启用自聊天模式。**
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:当设置了 `identity.name` 时，自聊天回复默认为 `[{identity.name}]`（否则为 `[openhand]`），
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 早期 OpenHand 版本支持 Twilio 的 WhatsApp Business 集成。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 登录命令：`openhand channels login`（通过关联设备扫描二维码）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 多账户登录：`openhand channels login --account <id>`（`<id>` = `accountId`）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 凭证存储在 `~/.openhand/credentials/whatsapp/<accountId>/creds.json`。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 旧版兼容性：较旧的安装将 Baileys 文件直接存储在 `~/.openhand/credentials/` 中。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 登出：`openhand channels logout`（或 `--account <id>`）删除 WhatsApp 认证状态（但保留共享的 `oauth.json`）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:  - 配对：未知发送者会收到配对码（通过 `openhand pairing approve whatsapp <code>` 批准；码在 1 小时后过期）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:如果你在**个人 WhatsApp 号码**上运行 OpenHand，请启用 `channels.whatsapp.selfChatMode`（见上面的示例）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:**当我关联 WhatsApp 时，OpenHand 会给随机联系人发消息吗？**
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:不会。默认私信策略是**配对**，因此未知发送者只会收到配对码，他们的消息**不会被处理**。OpenHand 只会回复它收到的聊天，或你明确触发的发送（智能体/CLI）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 使用以下命令批准：`openhand pairing approve whatsapp <code>`（使用 `openhand pairing list whatsapp` 列出）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:**多个人可以在一个 WhatsApp 号码上使用不同的 OpenHand 实例吗？**
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:    - CLI：`openhand message send --media <mp4> --gif-playback`
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 最佳效果：OGG/Opus。OpenHand 将 `audio/ogg` 重写为 `audio/ogg; codecs=opus`。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 日志文件：`/tmp/openhand/openhand-YYYY-MM-DD.log`（可配置）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 修复：在 Gateway 网关主机上运行 `openhand channels login` 并扫描二维码（WhatsApp → 设置 → 关联设备）。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/whatsapp.md:- 修复：`openhand doctor`（或重启 Gateway 网关）。如果问题持续，通过 `channels login` 重新关联并检查 `openhand logs --follow`。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:Matrix 是一个开放的去中心化消息协议。OpenHand 以 Matrix **用户**身份连接到任意主服务器，因此你需要为机器人创建一个 Matrix 账户。登录后，你可以直接私信机器人或邀请它加入房间（Matrix"群组"）。Beeper 也是一个有效的客户端选项，但它需要启用 E2EE。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:openhand plugins install @openhand/matrix
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:openhand plugins install ./extensions/matrix
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:如果你在配置/新手引导期间选择 Matrix 并检测到 git 检出，OpenHand 将自动提供本地安装路径。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:   - 从 npm：`openhand plugins install @openhand/matrix`
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:   - 从本地检出：`openhand plugins install ./extensions/matrix`
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:   - 或设置 `channels.matrix.userId` + `channels.matrix.password`：OpenHand 会调用相同的登录端点，将访问令牌存储在 `~/.openhand/credentials/matrix/credentials.json`，并在下次启动时重用。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:- 首次连接时，OpenHand 会向你的其他会话请求设备验证。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:- 如果无法加载加密模块，E2EE 将被禁用，加密房间将无法解密；OpenHand 会记录警告。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:加密状态按账户 + 访问令牌存储在 `~/.openhand/matrix/accounts/<account>/<homeserver>__<user>/<token-hash>/crypto/`（SQLite 数据库）。同步状态存储在同目录的 `bot-storage.json` 中。如果访问令牌（设备）更改，将创建新的存储，机器人必须重新验证才能访问加密房间。
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:  - `openhand pairing list matrix`
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:  - `openhand pairing approve matrix <CODE>`
./docs/zh-CN/channels/matrix.md:- 启动时，OpenHand 将允许列表中的房间/用户名称解析为 ID 并记录映射；未解析的条目不会参与允许列表匹配。

./docs/zh-CN/channels/imessage.md:**远程附件：** 当 `cliPath` 通过 SSH 指向远程主机时，"信息"数据库中的附件路径引用的是远程机器上的文件。OpenHand 可以通过设置 `channels.imessage.remoteHost` 自动通过 SCP 获取这些文件：
./docs/zh-CN/channels/imessage.md:如果未设置 `remoteHost`，OpenHand 会尝试通过解析包装脚本中的 SSH 命令自动检测。建议显式配置以提高可靠性。

./docs/zh-CN/channels/groups.md:OpenHand 在各平台上统一处理群聊：WhatsApp、Telegram、Discord、Slack、Signal、iMessage、Microsoft Teams。

./docs/index.md:    Guided setup with `openhand onboard` and pairing flows.
./docs/index.md:## What is OpenHand?
./docs/index.md:OpenHand is a **self-hosted gateway** that connects your favorite chat apps — WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage, and more — to AI coding agents like Pi. You run a single Gateway process on your own machine (or a server), and it becomes the bridge between your messaging apps and an always-available AI assistant.
./docs/index.md:  <Step title="Install OpenHand">
./docs/index.md:    npm install -g openhand@latest
./docs/index.md:    openhand onboard --install-daemon
./docs/index.md:    openhand channels login
./docs/index.md:    openhand gateway --port 18789
./docs/index.md:  <img src="whatsapp-openhand.jpg" alt="OpenHand" width="420" />
./docs/index.md:Config lives at `~/.openhand/openhand.json`.
./docs/index.md:- If you **do nothing**, OpenHand uses the bundled Pi binary in RPC mode with per-sender sessions.
./docs/index.md:  messages: { groupChat: { mentionPatterns: ["@openhand"] } },

./docs/logging.md:`/tmp/openhand/openhand-YYYY-MM-DD.log`

./docs/logging.md:    "file": "/path/to/openhand.log"

./docs/logging.md:openhand doctor

./docs/logging.md:All logging configuration lives under `logging` in `~/.openhand/openhand.json`.
./docs/logging.md:    "file": "/tmp/openhand/openhand-YYYY-MM-DD.log",
./docs/logging.md:You can override both via the **`OPENHAND_LOG_LEVEL`** environment variable (e.g. `OPENHAND_LOG_LEVEL=debug`). The env var takes precedence over the config file, so you can raise verbosity for a single run without editing `openhand.json`. You can also pass the global CLI option **`--log-level <level>`** (for example, `openhand --log-level debug gateway run`), which overrides the environment variable for that command.
./docs/logging.md:- OpenHand exports via **OTLP/HTTP (protobuf)** today.

./docs/concepts/agent.md:OpenHand runs a single embedded agent runtime derived from **pi-mono**.
./docs/concepts/agent.md:OpenHand uses a single agent workspace directory (`agents.defaults.workspace`) as the agent’s **only** working directory (`cwd`) for tools and context.
./docs/concepts/agent.md:Recommended: use `openhand setup` to create `~/.openhand/openhand.json` if missing and initialize the workspace files.
./docs/concepts/agent.md:Inside `agents.defaults.workspace`, OpenHand expects these user-editable files:
./docs/concepts/agent.md:On the first turn of a new session, OpenHand injects the contents of these files directly into the agent context.
./docs/concepts/agent.md:If a file is missing, OpenHand injects a single “missing file” marker line (and `openhand setup` will create a safe default template).
./docs/concepts/agent.md:OpenHand loads skills from three locations (workspace wins on name conflict):
./docs/concepts/agent.md:- Managed/local: `~/.openhand/skills`
./docs/concepts/agent.md:OpenHand reuses pieces of the pi-mono codebase (models/tools), but **session management, discovery, and tool wiring are OpenHand-owned**.
./docs/concepts/agent.md:- `~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/sessions/<SessionId>.jsonl`
./docs/concepts/agent.md:The session ID is stable and chosen by OpenHand.
./docs/concepts/agent.md:- If you omit the provider, OpenHand treats the input as an alias or a model for the **default provider** (only works when there is no `/` in the model ID).
./docs/concepts/usage-tracking.md:- `/usage cost` in chats: local cost summary aggregated from OpenHand session logs.
./docs/concepts/usage-tracking.md:- CLI: `openhand status --usage` prints a full per-provider breakdown.
./docs/concepts/usage-tracking.md:- CLI: `openhand channels list` prints the same usage snapshot alongside provider config (use `--no-usage` to skip).
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:summary: "Context window + compaction: how OpenHand keeps sessions under model limits"
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:Every model has a **context window** (max tokens it can see). Long-running chats accumulate messages and tool results; once the window is tight, OpenHand **compacts** older history to stay within limits.
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:Use the `agents.defaults.compaction` setting in your `openhand.json` to configure compaction behavior (mode, target tokens, etc.).
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:When a session nears or exceeds the model’s context window, OpenHand triggers auto-compaction and may retry the original request using the compacted context.
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:Before compaction, OpenHand can run a **silent memory flush** turn to store
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:Context window is model-specific. OpenHand uses the model definition from the configured provider catalog to determine limits.
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:OpenHand also supports OpenAI Responses server-side compaction hints for
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:compatible direct OpenAI models. This is separate from local OpenHand
./docs/concepts/compaction.md:- Local compaction: OpenHand summarizes and persists into session JSONL.

./docs/concepts/architecture.md:  - `/__openhand__/a2ui/` (A2UI host)
./docs/concepts/architecture.md:- If `OPENHAND_GATEWAY_TOKEN` (or `--token`) is set, `connect.params.auth.token`
./docs/concepts/architecture.md:- Start: `openhand gateway` (foreground, logs to stdout).

./docs/concepts/context.md:  - You want to understand what “context” means in OpenHand
./docs/concepts/context.md:“Context” is **everything OpenHand sends to the model for a run**. It is bounded by the model’s **context window** (token limit).
./docs/concepts/context.md:- **System prompt** (OpenHand-built): rules, tools, skills list, time/runtime, and injected workspace files.
./docs/concepts/context.md:## How OpenHand builds the system prompt
./docs/concepts/context.md:The system prompt is **OpenHand-owned** and rebuilt each run. It includes:
./docs/concepts/context.md:By default, OpenHand injects a fixed set of workspace files (if present):
./docs/concepts/context.md:Large files are truncated per-file using `agents.defaults.bootstrapMaxChars` (default `20000` chars). OpenHand also enforces a total bootstrap injection cap across files with `agents.defaults.bootstrapTotalMaxChars` (default `150000` chars). `/context` shows **raw vs injected** sizes and whether truncation happened.
./docs/concepts/session-pruning.md:- If you set any of these values explicitly, OpenHand does **not** override them.
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:summary: "OAuth in OpenHand: token exchange, storage, and multi-account patterns"
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:  - You want to understand OpenHand OAuth end-to-end
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:OpenHand supports “subscription auth” via OAuth for providers that offer it (notably **OpenAI Codex (ChatGPT OAuth)**). For Anthropic subscriptions, use the **setup-token** flow. Anthropic subscription use outside Claude Code has been restricted for some users in the past, so treat it as a user-choice risk and verify current Anthropic policy yourself. OpenAI Codex OAuth is explicitly supported for use in external tools like OpenHand. This page explains:
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:OpenHand also supports **provider plugins** that ship their own OAuth or API‑key
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:openhand models auth login --provider <id>
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:- you log in via OpenHand _and_ via Claude Code / Codex CLI → one of them randomly gets “logged out” later
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:To reduce that, OpenHand treats `auth-profiles.json` as a **token sink**:
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:- Auth profiles (OAuth + API keys + optional value-level refs): `~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth-profiles.json`
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:- Legacy compatibility file: `~/.openhand/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth.json`
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:- `~/.openhand/credentials/oauth.json` (imported into `auth-profiles.json` on first use)
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:All of the above also respect `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR` (state dir override). Full reference: [/gateway/configuration](/gateway/configuration#auth-storage-oauth--api-keys)
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:Run `claude setup-token` on any machine, then paste it into OpenHand:
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:openhand models auth setup-token --provider anthropic
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:openhand models auth paste-token --provider anthropic
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:openhand models status
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:OpenHand’s interactive login flows are implemented in `@mariozechner/pi-ai` and wired into the wizards/commands.
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:2. paste the token into OpenHand
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:The wizard path is `openhand onboard` → auth choice `setup-token` (Anthropic).
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:OpenAI Codex OAuth is explicitly supported for use outside the Codex CLI, including OpenHand workflows.
./docs/concepts/oauth.md:Wizard path is `openhand onboard` → auth choice `openai-codex`.

./docs/concepts/session.md:- Reset triggers: exact `/new` or `/reset` (plus any extras in `resetTriggers`) start a fresh session id and pass the remainder of the message through. `/new <model>` accepts a model alias, `provider/model`, or provider name (fuzzy match) to set the new session model. If `/new` or `/reset` is sent alone, OpenHand runs a short “hello” greeting turn to confirm the reset.

./docs/concepts/session.md:- Send `/stop` (or standalone abort phrases like `stop`, `stop action`, `stop run`, `stop openhand`) to abort the current run, clear queued followups for that session, and stop any sub-agent runs spawned from it (the reply includes the stopped count).

./docs/automation/hooks.md:Hooks provide an extensible event-driven system for automating actions in response to agent commands and events. Hooks are automatically discovered from directories and can be managed via CLI commands, similar to how skills work in OpenHand.
./docs/automation/hooks.md:- **Webhooks**: external HTTP webhooks that let other systems trigger work in OpenHand. See [Webhook Hooks](/automation/webhook) or use `openhand webhooks` for Gmail helper commands.

./docs/automation/hooks.md:- **📝 command-logger**: Logs all command events to `~/.openhand/logs/commands.log`

./docs/pi.md:summary: "Architecture of OpenHand's embedded Pi agent integration and session lifecycle"
./docs/pi.md:  - Understanding Pi SDK integration design in OpenHand
./docs/pi.md:This document describes how OpenHand integrates with [pi-coding-agent](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/tree/main/packages/coding-agent) and its sibling packages (`pi-ai`, `pi-agent-core`, `pi-tui`) to power its AI agent capabilities.
./docs/pi.md:OpenHand uses the pi SDK to embed an AI coding agent into its messaging gateway architecture. Instead of spawning pi as a subprocess or using RPC mode, OpenHand directly imports and instantiates pi's `AgentSession` via `createAgentSession()`. This embedded approach provides:
./docs/pi.md:| `pi-tui`          | Terminal UI components (used in OpenHand's local TUI mode)                                             |
./docs/pi.md:├── pi-tools.ts                    # createOpenHandCodingTools()
./docs/pi.md:├── openhand-tools.ts              # OpenHand-specific tools
./docs/pi.md:  config: openhandConfig,
./docs/pi.md:Image injection is prompt-local: OpenHand loads image refs from the current prompt and
./docs/pi.md:2. **Custom Replacements**: OpenHand replaces bash with `exec`/`process`, customizes read/edit/write for sandbox
./docs/pi.md:3. **OpenHand Tools**: messaging, browser, canvas, sessions, cron, gateway, etc.
./docs/pi.md:This ensures OpenHand's policy filtering, sandbox integration, and extended toolset remain consistent across providers.
./docs/pi.md:The system prompt is built in `buildAgentSystemPrompt()` (`system-prompt.ts`). It assembles a full prompt with sections including Tooling, Tool Call Style, Safety guardrails, OpenHand CLI reference, Skills, Docs, Workspace, Sandbox, Messaging, Reply Tags, Voice, Silent Replies, Heartbeats, Runtime metadata, plus Memory and Reactions when enabled, and optional context files and extra system prompt content. Sections are trimmed for minimal prompt mode used by subagents.
./docs/pi.md:OpenHand wraps this with `guardSessionManager()` for tool result safety.

./docs/reference/RELEASING.md:- [ ] Confirm package metadata (name, description, repository, keywords, license) and `bin` map points to [`openhand.mjs`](https://github.com/openhand/openhand/blob/main/openhand.mjs) for `openhand`.
./docs/reference/RELEASING.md:- [ ] If A2UI inputs changed, run `pnpm canvas:a2ui:bundle` and commit any updated [`src/canvas-host/a2ui/a2ui.bundle.js`](https://github.com/openhand/openhand/blob/main/src/canvas-host/a2ui/a2ui.bundle.js).

./docs/reference/RELEASING.md:  - If the immediate previous npm release is known broken, set `OPENHAND_INSTALL_SMOKE_PREVIOUS=<last-good-version>` or `OPENHAND_INSTALL_SMOKE_SKIP_PREVIOUS=1` for the preinstall step.

./docs/reference/test.md:- `pnpm test` on Node 24+: OpenHand auto-disables Vitest `vmForks` and uses `forks` to avoid `ERR_VM_MODULE_LINK_FAILURE` / `module is already linked`. You can force behavior with `OPENHAND_TEST_VM_FORKS=0|1`.
./docs/reference/test.md:- Gateway integration: opt-in via `OPENHAND_TEST_INCLUDE_GATEWAY=1 pnpm test` or `pnpm test:gateway`.
./docs/reference/test.md:- `pnpm test:e2e`: Runs gateway end-to-end smoke tests (multi-instance WS/HTTP/node pairing). Defaults to `vmForks` + adaptive workers in `vitest.e2e.config.ts`; tune with `OPENHAND_E2E_WORKERS=<n>` and set `OPENHAND_E2E_VERBOSE=1` for verbose logs.

./docs/help/environment.md:summary: "Where OpenHand loads environment variables and the precedence order"
./docs/help/environment.md:OpenHand pulls environment variables from multiple sources. The rule is **never override existing values**.
./docs/help/environment.md:3. **Global `.env`** at `~/.openhand/.env` (aka `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/.env`; does not override).
./docs/help/environment.md:4. **Config `env` block** in `~/.openhand/openhand.json` (applied only if missing).
./docs/help/environment.md:5. **Optional login-shell import** (`env.shellEnv.enabled` or `OPENHAND_LOAD_SHELL_ENV=1`), applied only for missing expected keys.
./docs/help/environment.md:- `OPENHAND_LOAD_SHELL_ENV=1`
./docs/help/environment.md:- `OPENHAND_SHELL_ENV_TIMEOUT_MS=15000`
./docs/help/environment.md:OpenHand also injects context markers into spawned child processes:
./docs/help/environment.md:- `OPENHAND_SHELL=exec`: set for commands run through the `exec` tool.
./docs/help/environment.md:- `OPENHAND_SHELL=acp`: set for ACP runtime backend process spawns (for example `acpx`).
./docs/help/environment.md:- `OPENHAND_SHELL=acp-client`: set for `openhand acp client` when it spawns the ACP bridge process.
./docs/help/environment.md:- `OPENHAND_SHELL=tui-local`: set for local TUI `!` shell commands.
./docs/help/environment.md:OpenHand supports two env-driven patterns:
./docs/help/environment.md:| `OPENHAND_HOME`        | Override the home directory used for all internal path resolution (`~/.openhand/`, agent dirs, sessions, credentials). Useful when running OpenHand as a dedicated service user. |
./docs/help/environment.md:| `OPENHAND_STATE_DIR`   | Override the state directory (default `~/.openhand`).                                                                                                                            |
./docs/help/environment.md:| `OPENHAND_CONFIG_PATH` | Override the config file path (default `~/.openhand/openhand.json`).                                                                                                             |
./docs/help/environment.md:| `OPENHAND_LOG_LEVEL` | Override log level for both file and console (e.g. `debug`, `trace`). Takes precedence over `logging.level` and `logging.consoleLevel` in config. Invalid values are ignored with a warning. |
./docs/help/environment.md:### `OPENHAND_HOME`
./docs/help/environment.md:When set, `OPENHAND_HOME` replaces the system home directory (`$HOME` / `os.homedir()`) for all internal path resolution. This enables full filesystem isolation for headless service accounts.
./docs/help/environment.md:**Precedence:** `OPENHAND_HOME` > `$HOME` > `USERPROFILE` > `os.homedir()`
./docs/help/environment.md:  <key>OPENHAND_HOME</key>
./docs/help/environment.md:`OPENHAND_HOME` can also be set to a tilde path (e.g. `~/svc`), which gets expanded using `$HOME` before use.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:summary: "Symptom first troubleshooting hub for OpenHand"
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:  - OpenHand is not working and you need the fastest path to a fix
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:openhand status
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:openhand status --all
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:openhand gateway probe
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:openhand gateway status
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:openhand doctor
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:openhand channels status --probe
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:openhand logs --follow
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:- `openhand status` → shows configured channels and no obvious auth errors.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:- `openhand status --all` → full report is present and shareable.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:- `openhand gateway probe` → expected gateway target is reachable.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:- `openhand gateway status` → `Runtime: running` and `RPC probe: ok`.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:- `openhand doctor` → no blocking config/service errors.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:- `openhand channels status --probe` → channels report `connected` or `ready`.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:- `openhand logs --follow` → steady activity, no repeating fatal errors.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:## Plugin install fails with missing openhand extensions
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:If install fails with `package.json missing openhand.extensions`, the plugin package
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:is using an old shape that OpenHand no longer accepts.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:1. Add `openhand.extensions` to `package.json`.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:3. Republish the plugin and run `openhand plugins install <npm-spec>` again.
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:  "name": "@openhand/my-plugin",
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:  "openhand": {
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:  A[OpenHand is not working] --> B{What breaks first}
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:    openhand status
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:    openhand gateway status

./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:    openhand pairing list --channel <channel> [--account <id>]
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:    openhand logs --follow
./docs/help/troubleshooting.md:    openhand status

./docs/help/faq.md:- **Tailscale Serve** (recommended): keep bind loopback, run `openhand gateway --tailscale serve`, open `https://<magicdns>/`. If `gateway.auth.allowTailscale` is `true`, identity headers satisfy Control UI/WebSocket auth (no token, assumes trusted gateway host); HTTP APIs still require token/password.
./docs/help/faq.md:- **Tailnet bind**: run `openhand gateway --bind tailnet --token "<token>"`, open `http://<tailscale-ip>:18789/`, paste token in dashboard settings.

./docs/help/faq.md:`claude setup-token` generates a **token string** via the Claude Code CLI (it is not available in the web console). You can run it on **any machine**. Choose **Anthropic token (paste setup-token)** in the wizard or paste it with `openhand models auth paste-token --provider anthropic`. The token is stored as an auth profile for the **anthropic** provider and used like an API key (no auto-refresh). More detail: [OAuth](/concepts/oauth).
./docs/help/faq.md:Copy the token it prints, then choose **Anthropic token (paste setup-token)** in the wizard. If you want to run it on the gateway host, use `openhand models auth setup-token --provider anthropic`. If you ran `claude setup-token` elsewhere, paste it on the gateway host with `openhand models auth paste-token --provider anthropic`. See [Anthropic](/providers/anthropic).
./docs/help/faq.md:Yes - via **setup-token**. OpenHand no longer reuses Claude Code CLI OAuth tokens; use a setup-token or an Anthropic API key. Generate the token anywhere and paste it on the gateway host. See [Anthropic](/providers/anthropic) and [OAuth](/concepts/oauth).

./docs/help/faq.md:## What is OpenHand?
./docs/help/faq.md:### What is OpenHand in one paragraph
./docs/help/faq.md:OpenHand is a personal AI assistant you run on your own devices. It replies on the messaging surfaces you already use (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Mattermost (plugin), Discord, Google Chat, Signal, iMessage, WebChat) and can also do voice + a live Canvas on supported platforms. The **Gateway** is the always-on control plane; the assistant is the product.
./docs/help/faq.md:OpenHand is not "just a Claude wrapper." It's a **local-first control plane** that lets you run a
./docs/help/faq.md:### What are the top five everyday use cases for OpenHand
./docs/help/faq.md:### Can OpenHand help with lead gen outreach ads and blogs for a SaaS
./docs/help/faq.md:OpenHand draft and you approve.
./docs/help/faq.md:OpenHand is a **personal assistant** and coordination layer, not an IDE replacement. Use
./docs/help/faq.md:Claude Code or Codex for the fastest direct coding loop inside a repo. Use OpenHand when you
./docs/help/faq.md:Showcase: [https://openhand.ai/showcase](https://openhand.ai/showcase)
./docs/help/faq.md:Use managed overrides instead of editing the repo copy. Put your changes in `~/.openhand/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (or add a folder via `skills.load.extraDirs` in `~/.openhand/openhand.json`). Precedence is `<workspace>/skills` > `~/.openhand/skills` > bundled, so managed overrides win without touching git. Only upstream-worthy edits should live in the repo and go out as PRs.
./docs/help/faq.md:Yes. Add extra directories via `skills.load.extraDirs` in `~/.openhand/openhand.json` (lowest precedence). Default precedence remains: `<workspace>/skills` → `~/.openhand/skills` → bundled → `skills.load.extraDirs`. `clawhub` installs into `./skills` by default, which OpenHand treats as `<workspace>/skills`.
./docs/help/faq.md:- Confirm cron is enabled (`cron.enabled`) and `OPENHAND_SKIP_CRON` is not set.

./docs/help/faq.md:### Can OpenHand run tasks on a schedule or continuously in the background
./docs/help/faq.md:Not directly. macOS skills are gated by `metadata.openhand.os` plus required binaries, and skills only appear in the system prompt when they are eligible on the **Gateway host**. On Linux, `darwin`-only skills (like `apple-notes`, `apple-reminders`, `things-mac`) will not load unless you override the gating.
./docs/help/faq.md:Run the Gateway where the macOS binaries exist, then connect from Linux in [remote mode](#how-do-i-run-openhand-in-remote-mode-client-connects-to-a-gateway-elsewhere) or over Tailscale. The skills load normally because the Gateway host is macOS.
./docs/help/faq.md:Run the Gateway on Linux, pair a macOS node (menubar app), and set **Node Run Commands** to "Always Ask" or "Always Allow" on the Mac. OpenHand can treat macOS-only skills as eligible when the required binaries exist on the node. The agent runs those skills via the `nodes` tool. If you choose "Always Ask", approving "Always Allow" in the prompt adds that command to the allowlist.
./docs/help/faq.md:3. Override the skill metadata (workspace or `~/.openhand/skills`) to allow Linux:
./docs/help/faq.md:   metadata: { "openhand": { "os": ["darwin", "linux"], "requires": { "bins": ["memo"] } } }
./docs/help/faq.md:ClawHub installs into `./skills` under your current directory (or falls back to your configured OpenHand workspace); OpenHand treats that as `<workspace>/skills` on the next session. For shared skills across agents, place them in `~/.openhand/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`. Some skills expect binaries installed via Homebrew; on Linux that means Linuxbrew (see the Homebrew Linux FAQ entry above). See [Skills](/tools/skills) and [ClawHub](/tools/clawhub).

./docs/help/faq.md:### Is all data used with OpenHand saved locally
./docs/help/faq.md:No - **OpenHand's state is local**, but **external services still see what you send them**.
./docs/help/faq.md:  (`~/.openhand` + your workspace directory).
./docs/help/faq.md:### Where does OpenHand store its data
./docs/help/faq.md:Everything lives under `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR` (default: `~/.openhand`):
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/openhand.json`                             | Main config (JSON5)                                                |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/credentials/oauth.json`                    | Legacy OAuth import (copied into auth profiles on first use)       |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth-profiles.json` | Auth profiles (OAuth, API keys, and optional `keyRef`/`tokenRef`)  |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/secrets.json`                              | Optional file-backed secret payload for `file` SecretRef providers |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/agent/auth.json`          | Legacy compatibility file (static `api_key` entries scrubbed)      |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/credentials/`                              | Provider state (e.g. `whatsapp/<accountId>/creds.json`)            |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/`                                   | Per-agent state (agentDir + sessions)                              |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/sessions/`                | Conversation history & state (per agent)                           |
./docs/help/faq.md:| `$OPENHAND_STATE_DIR/agents/<agentId>/sessions/sessions.json`   | Session metadata (per agent)                                       |
./docs/help/faq.md:Legacy single-agent path: `~/.openhand/agent/*` (migrated by `openhand doctor`).
./docs/help/faq.md:Your **workspace** (AGENTS.md, memory files, skills, etc.) is separate and configured via `agents.defaults.workspace` (default: `~/.openhand/workspace`).
./docs/help/faq.md:These files live in the **agent workspace**, not `~/.openhand`.
./docs/help/faq.md:- **State dir (`~/.openhand`)**: config, credentials, auth profiles, sessions, logs,
./docs/help/faq.md:  and shared skills (`~/.openhand/skills`).
./docs/help/faq.md:Default workspace is `~/.openhand/workspace`, configurable via:
./docs/help/faq.md:  agents: { defaults: { workspace: "~/.openhand/workspace" } },
./docs/help/faq.md:Do **not** commit anything under `~/.openhand` (credentials, sessions, tokens, or encrypted secrets payloads).

./docs/help/faq.md:### Why does openhand gateway status show Config cli and Config service different
./docs/help/faq.md:You're editing one config file while the service is running another (often a `--profile` / `OPENHAND_STATE_DIR` mismatch).
./docs/help/faq.md:openhand gateway install --force
./docs/help/faq.md:OpenHand enforces a runtime lock by binding the WebSocket listener immediately on startup (default `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`). If the bind fails with `EADDRINUSE`, it throws `GatewayLockError` indicating another instance is already listening.
./docs/help/faq.md:Fix: stop the other instance, free the port, or run with `openhand gateway --port <port>`.

./docs/help/faq.md:### ELI5 openhand gateway restart vs openhand gateway
./docs/help/faq.md:- `openhand gateway restart`: restarts the **background service** (launchd/systemd).
./docs/help/faq.md:- `openhand gateway`: runs the gateway **in the foreground** for this terminal session.

./docs/help/faq.md:OpenHand blocks **cross-provider** messaging by default. If a tool call is bound
./docs/help/faq.md:**A:** In OpenHand, credentials and model selection are separate. Setting `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` (or storing an Anthropic API key in auth profiles) enables authentication, but the actual default model is whatever you configure in `agents.defaults.model.primary` (for example, `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5` or `anthropic/claude-opus-4-6`). If you see `No credentials found for profile "anthropic:default"`, it means the Gateway couldn't find Anthropic credentials in the expected `auth-profiles.json` for the agent that's running.

./docs/help/testing.md:OpenHand has three Vitest suites (unit/integration, e2e, live) and a small set of Docker runners.
./docs/help/testing.md:  - OpenHand uses Vitest `vmForks` on Node 22/23 for faster unit shards.
./docs/help/testing.md:  - On Node 24+, OpenHand automatically falls back to regular `forks` to avoid Node VM linking errors (`ERR_VM_MODULE_LINK_FAILURE` / `module is already linked`).
./docs/help/testing.md:  - Override manually with `OPENHAND_TEST_VM_FORKS=0` (force `forks`) or `OPENHAND_TEST_VM_FORKS=1` (force `vmForks`).
./docs/help/testing.md:  - `OPENHAND_E2E_WORKERS=<n>` to force worker count (capped at 16).
./docs/help/testing.md:  - `OPENHAND_E2E_VERBOSE=1` to re-enable verbose console output.
./docs/help/testing.md:- Default: **enabled** by `pnpm test:live` (sets `OPENHAND_LIVE_TEST=1`)

./docs/gateway/local-models.md:summary: "Run OpenHand on local LLMs (LM Studio, vLLM, LiteLLM, custom OpenAI endpoints)"
./docs/gateway/local-models.md:Local is doable, but OpenHand expects large context + strong defenses against prompt injection. Small cards truncate context and leak safety. Aim high: **≥2 maxed-out Mac Studios or equivalent GPU rig (~$30k+)**. A single **24 GB** GPU works only for lighter prompts with higher latency. Use the **largest / full-size model variant you can run**; aggressively quantized or “small” checkpoints raise prompt-injection risk (see [Security](/gateway/security)).

./docs/gateway/openai-http-api.md:OpenHand’s Gateway can serve a small OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint.
./docs/gateway/openai-http-api.md:Under the hood, requests are executed as a normal Gateway agent run (same codepath as `openhand agent`), so routing/permissions/config match your Gateway.

./docs/gateway/security/index.md:> OpenHand is **not** a hostile multi-tenant security boundary for multiple adversarial users sharing one agent/gateway.
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:OpenHand security guidance assumes a **personal assistant** deployment: one trusted operator boundary, potentially many agents.
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:## Quick check: `openhand security audit`

./docs/gateway/security/index.md:OpenHand is both a product and an experiment: you’re wiring frontier-model behavior into real messaging surfaces and real tools. **There is no “perfectly secure” setup.** The goal is to be deliberate about:
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:OpenHand assumes the host and config boundary are trusted:
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:- If someone can modify Gateway host state/config (`~/.openhand`, including `openhand.json`), treat them as a trusted operator.
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:- OpenHand can run multiple gateway instances on one machine, but recommended operations favor clean trust-boundary separation.
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:- If multiple users want OpenHand, use one VPS/host per user.
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:OpenHand is designed as a personal assistant security model: one trusted operator boundary, potentially many agents.
./docs/gateway/security/index.md:4. Claim is not listed in [Out of Scope](https://github.com/openhand/openhand/blob/main/SECURITY.md#out-of-scope).

./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:summary: "How OpenHand sandboxing works: modes, scopes, workspace access, and images"
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:OpenHand can run **tools inside Docker containers** to reduce blast radius.
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:  - By default, sandbox browser containers use a dedicated Docker network (`openhand-sandbox-browser`) instead of the global `bridge` network.
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:  - noVNC observer access is password-protected by default; OpenHand emits a short-lived token URL that serves a local bootstrap page and opens noVNC with password in URL fragment (not query/header logs).
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:- `"none"` (default): tools see a sandbox workspace under `~/.openhand/sandboxes`.
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:OpenHand mirrors eligible skills into the sandbox workspace (`.../skills`) so
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:- OpenHand blocks dangerous bind sources (for example: `docker.sock`, `/etc`, `/proc`, `/sys`, `/dev`, and parent mounts that would expose them).
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:Default image: `openhand-sandbox:bookworm-slim`
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:`openhand-sandbox-common:bookworm-slim`.
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:- `--remote-debugging-port=<derived from OPENHAND_BROWSER_CDP_PORT>`
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:  when containers lack GPU support. Set `OPENHAND_BROWSER_DISABLE_GRAPHICS_FLAGS=0`
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:  `OPENHAND_BROWSER_DISABLE_EXTENSIONS=0` for extension-reliant flows.
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:  `OPENHAND_BROWSER_RENDERER_PROCESS_LIMIT=<N>`, where `0` keeps Chromium's default.
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:Set `OPENHAND_SANDBOX=1` (or `true`/`yes`/`on`) to enable that path. You can
./docs/gateway/sandboxing.md:override socket location with `OPENHAND_DOCKER_SOCKET`. Full setup and env

./docs/gateway/discovery.md:OpenHand has two distinct problems that look similar on the surface:
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:The design goal is to keep all network discovery/advertising in the **Node Gateway** (`openhand gateway`) and keep clients (mac app, iOS) as consumers.
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:  - `_openhand-gw._tcp` (gateway transport beacon)
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:  - `cliPath=<path>` (optional; absolute path to a runnable `openhand` entrypoint or binary)
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:- `OPENHAND_DISABLE_BONJOUR=1` disables advertising.
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:- `gateway.bind` in `~/.openhand/openhand.json` controls the Gateway bind mode.
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:- `OPENHAND_SSH_PORT` overrides the SSH port advertised in TXT (defaults to 22).
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:- `OPENHAND_TAILNET_DNS` publishes a `tailnetDns` hint (MagicDNS).
./docs/gateway/discovery.md:- `OPENHAND_CLI_PATH` overrides the advertised CLI path.
./docs/gateway/gateway-lock.md:- If the port is occupied by _another_ process, the error is the same; free the port or choose another with `openhand gateway --port <port>`.

./docs/gateway/configuration.md:OpenHand reads an optional <Tooltip tip="JSON5 supports comments and trailing commas">**JSON5**</Tooltip> config from `~/.openhand/openhand.json`.
./docs/gateway/configuration.md:If the file is missing, OpenHand uses safe defaults. Common reasons to add a config:
./docs/gateway/configuration.md:**New to configuration?** Start with `openhand onboard` for interactive setup, or check out the [Configuration Examples](/gateway/configuration-examples) guide for complete copy-paste configs.
./docs/gateway/configuration.md:// ~/.openhand/openhand.json

./docs/gateway/configuration.md:    Edit `~/.openhand/openhand.json` directly. The Gateway watches the file and applies changes automatically (see [hot reload](#config-hot-reload)).
./docs/gateway/configuration.md:OpenHand only accepts configurations that fully match the schema. Unknown keys, malformed types, or invalid values cause the Gateway to **refuse to start**. The only root-level exception is `$schema` (string), so editors can attach JSON Schema metadata.
./docs/gateway/configuration.md:- Only diagnostic commands work (`openhand doctor`, `openhand logs`, `openhand health`, `openhand status`)
./docs/gateway/configuration.md:- Run `openhand doctor` to see exact issues

./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:  - Running OpenHand behind an identity-aware proxy
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:  - Setting up Pomerium, Caddy, or nginx with OAuth in front of OpenHand
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:- You run OpenHand behind an **identity-aware proxy** (Pomerium, Caddy + OAuth, nginx + oauth2-proxy, Traefik + forward auth)
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:3. OpenHand checks that the request came from a **trusted proxy IP** (configured in `gateway.trustedProxies`)
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:4. OpenHand extracts the user identity from the configured header
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:- OpenHand can stay on loopback HTTP behind the proxy.
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:If OpenHand itself serves HTTPS directly (no TLS-terminating proxy), set:
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:  - from: https://openhand.example.com
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:    to: http://openhand-gateway:18789
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:openhand.example.com {
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:    reverse_proxy openhand:18789 {
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:    proxy_pass http://openhand:18789;
./docs/gateway/trusted-proxy-auth.md:`openhand security audit` will flag trusted-proxy auth with a **critical** severity finding. This is intentional — it's a reminder that you're delegating security to your proxy setup.

./docs/gateway/remote-gateway-readme.md:# Running OpenHand.app with a Remote Gateway
./docs/gateway/remote-gateway-readme.md:OpenHand.app uses SSH tunneling to connect to a remote gateway. This guide shows you how to set it up.
